creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Jony Hudson from comment #3)

> So it looks like this only affects instances that have been configured. Is it possible that this is why you didn't see the failure in your test?

Yes, this is very likely.

This also means that the issue that you are experiencing is most likely an upstream problem. Please report it to the upstream here: https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdGuardHome/issues
